name: STANDARDS-URLS registry: fetch_frequency must be one of {hourly, daily, weekly, monthly} (predictable cadence)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: x
  name: X
  url: https://x.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: every-other-fortnight
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-standards-urls.sh" "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml"
